claim: Increased microtubule acetylation exacerbates LRRK2 Roc-COR domain mutation induced locomotor deficits.
evidence_sentences: In vitro, increasing microtubule acetylation using deacetylase inhibitors or the tubulin acetylase αTAT1 prevents association of mutant LRRK2 with microtubules, and the deacetylase inhibitor trichostatin A (TSA) restores axonal transport.
